hooks.command: cmd="$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty')"; case "$cmd" in *"git push"*":main"*|*"git push"*":refs/heads/main"*) echo "BLOCKED: pushing to 'main' is not allowed. Open a PR instead." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*|*"git push"*|*"git merge"*|*"git rebase"*|*"git cherry-pick"*|*"git revert"*|*"git am"*) branch="$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -z "$branch" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: cannot determine current branch; refusing commit/push (fail-closed). Server-side branch protection on 'main' is the authoritative guard." >&2; exit 2; fi; if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: 'main' is a protected branch. Create a feature branch (git switch -c feat/...) and open a PR instead." >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac; exit 0

f="$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty')"; case "$f" in *src-tauri/*.rs) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/src-tauri" && cargo fmt && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings ;; *src/*.ts|*src/*.tsx) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx biome check --write "$f" ;; esac
